title: Arid Biomes Only
description: An Overworld with only arid biomes!
body:
Transform your Minecraft adventure with an Overworld filled exclusively with arid biomes!

This mod generates only the following biomes, creating a striking world of sandy dunes, rugged canyons, and scenic rivers that make exploration more vibrant and enjoyable:
- Desert
- Badlands
- Eroded Badlands
- Wooded Badlands

Perfect for players craving a unique, challenging, and visually captivating desert survival experience!
